name: Act on Prevention of Damage Caused by Unauthorized Acts Against Important Computers
owner: Cabinet Secretariat / National Cybersecurity Office (NCO), Japan
description: Act No. 42 of Reiwa 7 (2025), Japan's first "active cyber defense" law. Authorizes government monitoring/analysis of communications data for threat detection, mandatory incident reporting by critical-infrastructure operators, public-private information-sharing agreements, and government counter-access/neutralization of attacker infrastructure, overseen by a new Cyber Communications Information Management Committee.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/regulation/cyber.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Primary legislation -- excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13, same basis as APPI and the My Number Act.

current_extraction.notes: No English translation exists yet. Acquired the Japanese table of contents and chapter/article structure (12 chapters, articles through 82+) via a Playwright browser session rendering e-Gov's JS single-page app -- plain curl/WebFetch got only the empty app shell (800 bytes). Full article body text not yet extracted, only the structural TOC.

scope.notes: Structure only (chapter/article TOC); full article text not yet acquired.
